title: loading backgrounds - photon shaders
description: adds loading backgrounds with special visuals using the photon shader
body:
# features
- adds lots of new loading backgrounds (screenshots of gameplay of the [photon shader](https://modrinth.com/project/lLqFfGNs))
- dependent on the [loading backgrounds](https://modrinth.com/project/dH40biZd) mod
- more than 20 backgounds
